factors.name: Visual Clutter
factors.description: Excessive visual stimuli competing for attention

factors.name: Workspace Organization
factors.description: How well the workspace is structured and organized

factors.name: Task Visibility
factors.description: How clearly the current task is reprensented

factors.name: Cognitive Load
factors.description: Mental effort required to process information

factors.name: Lighting
factors.description: Quality and amount of light in the workspace

factors.name: Air Quality
factors.description: Freshness and ventilation of the environment

factors.name: Environment Consistency
factors.description: Stability and predictability of the workspace

factors.name: Friction
factors.description: Barriers that make starting or continuing work harder

factors.name: Context Association
factors.description: Mental association between a place and focused work

factors.name: Lighting
factors.description: Brightness and light exposure in the room

factors.name: Light leakage
factors.description: External light entering the sleeping area
